title: The F & B Company
bodyText:
Filbert & Brolin's plague-born delivery empire: carts, posters, hero-branding ("Gond's Gift to Koviz"), child logistics. Board: Filbert + Brolin (operations), Eddy/Varen/Felson (directors, 25% profit share), **Mr. Spells (chairman — Filbert's pick)**. Soni deeply distrusts it and wants a communal rebuild instead.

> [!dm] A comedy engine with a knife inside: the party co-owns a company chaired by the campaign's shadow broker.
